projectDescription: A web application for managing a personal video game collection with CRUD operations, store locator via Google Maps, and free game recommendations from FreeToGame API.
keyFeatures: View, search, and filter personal video game collection
Add new games with title, genre, platform, and release year
Edit and delete existing game entries
SQLite database persistence via PHP backend
Google Maps integration to locate nearby video game stores
Free game recommendations from FreeToGame API
RESTful JSON API with Problem Details error format
Client-side form validation with user feedback
publicApiSurface: GET/POST php/db_service.php — List or search games
POST php/form_service.php — Add a new game
POST php/edit_service.php — Edit an existing game
